inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $245.6M ÷ 187.775M weighted average shares
inputs.normalization_note: Owner cash uses operating cash flow, not reported net earnings ($1.10/sh), which includes $54.4M one-time gain on deemed disposal of Osisko Development associate (MD&A). Adjusted earnings $0.88/sh shown as cross-check. Minimal sustaining capex at royalty holding company.

bear.notes: Gold price weakens; Eagle-style operator failures; GEO growth stalls near 85k; multiple compression

base.notes: GEO volume toward 120k by 2030 per filing 5-year outlook; 97% cash margin; dividend growth modest

bull.notes: Windfall, Cariboo, South Railroad and Namdini ramps on schedule; gold price sustained; accretive M&A continues

optionality_gate.notes: FY2025 dividends declared $0.211/sh (~6.0% yield at $35.31); Lawrence owner-cash path is stance gate; development GEO pipeline sized in option scan only.

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Royalty and stream interests carried at cost/amortized cost; economic value tied to metal prices and reserves, not marked to market on balance sheet (40-F exhibit 99.2 accounting policies)

option_scan.question: Undeveloped reserves / dormant royalty?
option_scan.evidence: 5-year outlook 120–135k GEOs by 2030 vs 80,775 in 2025; assumes Windfall, Hermosa/Taylor, Cariboo, Spring Valley, Amulsar, South Railroad start (MD&A); Eagle Gold excluded (receivership)

option_scan.question: In-business loss segment?
option_scan.evidence: Single royalty/stream operating model; 97% cash margin on revenues

option_scan.question: Private or illiquid stakes below fair value?
option_scan.evidence: Listed equity stakes in miners (Osisko Development stake reduced to 13.97% Aug 2025); fair value through profit or loss on remaining portfolio

option_scan.question: Embedded product option already in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: Producing royalties and streams (Canadian Malartic, Mantos Blancos, Namdini ramp) already in GEO and revenue path

nav_overlay_options.label: Development-stage royalty book (2030 GEO uplift)
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: Filing 5-year outlook adds ~40–55k GEOs; not fully in FY2025 OCF; probability-weighted overlay only, not in Lawrence FCF₀

nav_overlay_options.label: Eagle Gold mine royalty (receivership)
nav_overlay_options.base_terminal_rationale: Operations stopped June 2024; impairment taken; no GEO contribution in 5-year outlook
nav_overlay_options.evidence: MD&A portfolio section; Q2 2024 impairment $49.6M pre-tax on Eagle royalty

growth_explanation.base_mechanism: Producing mine ramps (Namdini, San Gabriel, Dalgaranga) plus 2030 development starts per company 5-year GEO outlook
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Sustained gold price decline or major operator failure on top-tier assets
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Faster-than-guided ramp at Windfall and Cariboo with accretive M&A at sub-15% IRR

catalyst_paths.impact: Volume toward 120–135k GEOs from development royalties
$115M San Gabriel anchor royalty plus seven-asset package
Commodity downturn plus operator delays; dividend flat, multiple compresses
